buckets.core_pain_point: Patients can't find you on Google, no online appointment booking, losing to bigger clinic chains that have websites.
Fully dependent on Instagram or Justdial, no direct bookings, no way to showcase work professionally.
Over-reliance on Urban Company or Sulekha, no direct leads, customers can't verify credibility before calling.
Paying heavy commissions to Swiggy/Zomato/OYO, no direct orders, no loyal customer base online.
No online credibility, clients Google you before calling and find nothing, losing deals to competitors with polished websites.
Relying only on word of mouth and pamphlets, no way to capture leads online, missing families who search on Google.
Invisible on Google, no product showcase, foot traffic declining while online searches increase.
No portfolio online, clients choose competitors they can see work from, no inquiry system.
